findings.summary: 25+ package-level mutable variables for command flags in vcluster/create.go create hidden coupling and prevent concurrent testing
evidence: Lines 21-58 declare 25+ package-level var for all create flags instead of scoping them to the command constructor
findings.suggestion: Move flag variables into the newCreateCmd() function scope or a createOptions struct, binding them to the *cobra.Command locally

findings.summary: tui.outputFormat is a package-level mutable global, making output format a shared hidden dependency
evidence: var outputFormat OutputFormat = FormatText is a package-level global modified by SetOutputFormat() and read by IsStructured(), RenderOutput(), PrintStructured()
findings.suggestion: Thread output format through a context or config parameter rather than relying on global mutable state

findings.summary: cmd/commands.go directly calls platform.UnstructuredNestedString to parse raw Kubernetes objects, violating the cmd-internal abstraction boundary
evidence: Lines 140-142: syncStatus, _, _ := platform.UnstructuredNestedString(app.Object, ...) appears throughout runStatus dashboard sections
findings.suggestion: Move ArgoCD app parsing into kube or platform package methods that return typed structs (like ArgoAppInfo), keeping cmd layer focused on display

findings.summary: platform.UnstructuredNestedString/Slice are trivial one-line delegations to internal/unstructured, creating unnecessary coupling
evidence: UnstructuredNestedString and UnstructuredNestedSlice simply call unstr.NestedString and unstr.NestedSlice, callers should import unstructured directly
findings.suggestion: Remove wrapper functions and have callers import internal/unstructured directly, or provide richer typed helpers in platform package

findings.summary: HctlError types (NewUserError, NewPlatformError) are used in some commands but most return plain fmt.Errorf, losing exit code semantics
evidence: runDiagnose uses fmt.Errorf while runStatusOnce uses hcerrors.NewPlatformError for the same pattern; deploy/status.go mixes both in the same function
findings.suggestion: Establish a convention: all command-level errors that reach the user should use the appropriate HctlError constructor

findings.summary: NewPlatformError callers use %v instead of %w, breaking error chain unwrapping
evidence: hcerrors.NewPlatformError('connecting to cluster for watch: %v', cErr) uses %v not %w, so errors.Is/errors.As cannot unwrap the original error
findings.suggestion: Change %v to %w in all NewPlatformError/NewUserError calls, or change the constructors to accept an error parameter explicitly

findings.summary: Multiple tui.Confirm() calls discard the error return, masking potential I/O failures
evidence: convenience.go: ok, _ := tui.Confirm(...); create.go: confirmed with _, _ pattern; scale.go: confirmed, _ := tui.Confirm(...)
findings.suggestion: Check the error from tui.Confirm and return it or log it; in non-TTY environments this error signals a real problem

findings.summary: No defined sentinel errors for frequent conditions like not found, already exists, or not configured, forcing string matching
evidence: errors package defines only HctlError with exit codes but no sentinel errors; callers create ad-hoc fmt.Errorf messages
findings.suggestion: Define sentinel errors like ErrNotConfigured, ErrResourceNotFound that wrap HctlError and can be checked with errors.Is()

findings.summary: runUp/runDown continue scaling after individual deployment failures, printing warnings but not returning aggregate errors
evidence: if err := client.ScaleDeployment(...); err != nil { fmt.Printf('Failed: %v') } — failure is printed but the function returns nil
findings.suggestion: Collect all errors and return a multi-error or summary error when any scaling operations fail

findings.summary: kube.Client is a concrete struct with no interface, making all dependent code untestable without a live cluster
evidence: Client struct has 30+ methods across 9 files but no interface defined; all consumers depend on the concrete type
findings.suggestion: Define a KubeClient interface (or per-domain interfaces like ArgoClient, PodClient) that Client implements, enabling test mocks

findings.summary: buildStakaterValues is a 200-line god function handling image, ports, env vars, resources, volumes, services, routes, certs, and extra objects
evidence: Function spans lines 125-370, processing 8+ distinct concerns with deeply nested map construction
findings.suggestion: Extract into focused builders: buildDeploymentSection(), buildServiceSection(), buildRouteSection(), buildCertificateSection()

findings.summary: vcluster/create.go is 792 lines mixing interactive wizard, spec building, git workflow, and provisioning watch
evidence: Single file contains runCreate, collectNameAndPreset, buildVClusterSpec, collectAdvancedSettings, applyClusterMetadata, collectWorkloadRepo, applyProdPresetExtras, writeAndCommitVCluster, watchProvisioning, parseEgressRule, parseKeyValue
findings.suggestion: Split into create_wizard.go (interactive collection), create_spec.go (spec building), create_provision.go (watch provisioning), keeping create.go as orchestrator

findings.summary: kube.NewClient(cfg.KubeContext) is called repeatedly within the same command, creating multiple clients for a single operation
evidence: runStatus dashboard has 6 separate DashboardSection.Load closures, each calling kube.NewClient independently
findings.suggestion: Create the client once before the dashboard and pass it into each section's Load function

findings.summary: The entire kube package (9 files, 30+ methods) has only trivial unit tests for splitFirst() and struct construction
evidence: client_test.go tests only TestSplitFirst and TestDeploymentInfoStruct; no tests for any infrastructure methods
findings.suggestion: Introduce interface for kube.Client and use fake clientsets or interface mocks to test critical methods

findings.summary: deploy.Translate the core Score-to-Stakater translation has no test that exercises the full function
evidence: translator_test.go tests resolveVariableValue (4 cases) and template generation, but Translate() itself is never called in any test
findings.suggestion: Add table-driven tests for Translate() with sample score.Workload inputs verifying the resulting StakaterValues, Files, and AddonsEntry

findings.summary: DiagnoseVCluster performs an 8-step diagnostic chain but has zero test coverage for the actual diagnosis logic
evidence: diagnose_test.go only tests StepStatus.String() constants and UnstructuredNestedString helper
findings.suggestion: With a kube client interface, test each diagnostic step independently and the full chain with fixture data

findings.summary: No shared test utilities, fake clients, or fixture data across the 13 test files
evidence: Each test file is self-contained; no testdata/ directories, no shared fake builders, no common assertion helpers
findings.suggestion: Create internal/testutil/ with fake kube client builders, fixture score.yaml files, and common assertion helpers

findings.summary: Some command groups split subcommands into separate files (deploy/) while others pack all subcommands into one file (addon/, scale/)
evidence: deploy/ has 5 files (deploy.go, init.go, run.go, render.go, status.go); addon/ has 1 file (581 lines); scale/ has 1 file (137 lines)
findings.suggestion: Adopt a consistent pattern: split addon.go into addon.go (NewCmd), addon_list.go, addon_enable.go, addon_disable.go, addon_status.go

findings.summary: cmd/commands.go (481 lines) contains init, status dashboard, diagnose, reconcile, and context display as multiple distinct concerns
evidence: File contains runInit, runStatus (6-section dashboard), runStatusOnce, runStatusWatch, runDiagnose, runReconcile, and runContext
findings.suggestion: Split into status.go (dashboard), diagnose_cmd.go, reconcile.go, and context.go, keeping commands.go for only shared helpers

findings.summary: internal/platform/ combines type definitions, diagnostic logic, status collection, provisioning waits, and vcluster spec building in one package
evidence: Package contains 8 files mixing: ResourceStatus types, DiagnoseVCluster chain, CollectPlatformStatus, WaitFor functions, VClusterSpec+presets+NewVClusterResource
findings.suggestion: Consider splitting into platform/status (types, collect), platform/diagnose, platform/vcluster (spec, presets, resource builder)
